rule-authorized-document-immutable.description: Authorized fiscal documents cannot be edited — only cancelled via counter-document

rule-cancellation-window.description: NF-e cancellation only allowed within 24 hours of authorization (Brazil)

rule-access-key-unique.description: Fiscal access key must be globally unique

rule-contingency-requires-later-transmis.description: Documents issued in contingency must be transmitted when system recovers
